name: Oobeya
description: Oobeya — Engineering intelligence platform tracking DORA metrics, delivery flow health, and team performance.

seo.title: Oobeya — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Oobeya: Oobeya — Engineering intelligence platform tracking DORA metrics, delivery flow health, and team performance.

when_to_use: DORA metrics tracking for engineering leadership reviews
Delivery flow health dashboards per team and service
Cycle time and throughput trend analysis over sprints
Benchmark team delivery performance against targets

pros: DORA metrics plus team wellbeing signals
Competitive pricing vs Jellyfish and LinearB
Jira, Git, and CI integrations out of the box
cons: Smaller vendor with limited enterprise references
Feature depth trails LinearB and Jellyfish
Community and docs thinner than competitors
review.verdict: Reasonable budget alternative for DORA tracking, but lacks the maturity and polish of market leaders.
review.best_for: Cost-conscious mid-size teams wanting DORA metrics without enterprise pricing.
review.not_for: Large enterprises needing deep forecasting and mature support organizations.
